queries.question: Tell me the tools each designer uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.tool_name  from Designer_Tools join Tools on Designer_Tools.tool_name = Tools.tool_name join Designers on Designer_Tools.designer_id = Designers.id   GROUP BY Designer_Tools.tool_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Designer_Tools.designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Designers)

queries.question: Tell me the tools each designer uses.
queries.sql: select designers.name , tools.tool_name from Designer_Tools join Tools on Designer_Tools.tool_name = Tools.tool_name join Designers on Designer_Tools.designer_id = Designers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tool_name WHERE {
  ?designer_tools a :Designer_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?designer_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?designers a :Designers .
  ?designer_tools p:hasDesigners ?designers .
  ?designers p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:tool_name ?tool_name .
}

queries.question: What tools are common to all designers
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.tool_name, Tools.description  from Designer_Tools join Tools on Designer_Tools.tool_name = Tools.tool_name join Designers on Designer_Tools.designer_id = Designers.id   GROUP BY Designer_Tools.tool_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Designer_Tools.designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Designers)

queries.question: For each designer, provide the tool name and description for each tool they use
queries.sql: select designers.name , tools.tool_name , tools.description from Designer_Tools join Tools on Designer_Tools.tool_name = Tools.tool_name join Designers on Designer_Tools.designer_id = Designers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tool_name ?description WHERE {
  ?designer_tools a :Designer_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?designer_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?designers a :Designers .
  ?designer_tools p:hasDesigners ?designers .
  ?designers p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:tool_name ?tool_name .
  ?tools p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What descriptions do you have on tools that are used the same by all designers?
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.description  from Designer_Tools join Tools on Designer_Tools.tool_name = Tools.tool_name join Designers on Designer_Tools.designer_id = Designers.id   GROUP BY Designer_Tools.tool_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Designer_Tools.designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Designers)

queries.question: For every designer, list descriptions of tools used.
queries.sql: select designers.name , tools.description from Designer_Tools join Tools on Designer_Tools.tool_name = Tools.tool_name join Designers on Designer_Tools.designer_id = Designers.id

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?designer_tools a :Designer_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?designer_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?designers a :Designers .
  ?designer_tools p:hasDesigners ?designers .
  ?designers p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me the tools each designer uses.
What tool names and descriptions do we have for every designer
Give me descriptions of the tools that each designer uses.
